components.name: Banners-Turnip-v26.2.0-20260608-r5-710-720-Test
components.blurb: EXPERIMENTAL - adds Adreno 710/720/722 support on Mesa main with hardware-specific magic registers and tuned GPU properties. Unverified on hardware; use sysmem mode. Other GPUs unaffected. Vulkan 1.4.353.

components.blurb: DXVK 2.7.1 ARM64EC + GPLAsync + binary semaphores (leegao). Set DXVK_DISABLE_TIMELINE_SEMAPHORES=1 for the fallback.

components.name: DXVK-2.7.1-binsem-gplasync-c3dd74be
components.blurb: DXVK 2.7.1 + GPLAsync + binary semaphores (leegao). Set DXVK_DISABLE_TIMELINE_SEMAPHORES=1 for the fallback.

components.name: MTR_WN_Turnip_v1.02_Axxx_p
components.blurb: WinNative Turnip v1.02 "Performance" (Mesa 26.2.0-devel, git 154d3b5). Targets Adreno Axxx. Includes MR 41562, 41477, 39491.

components.name: Vauzi-Turnip-710-720-722-v2.6
components.blurb: EXPERIMENTAL Turnip for Adreno 710/720/722 by vauzi (Mesa 26.2.0, Vulkan 1.4.352). Per-GPU magic register tuning + documented GMEM sizes (710=512KiB, 720/722=1MiB). Recommended mode: sysmem. Other GPUs unaffected.

components.name: Vauzi-Turnip-710-720-722-v2.6-fix2
components.blurb: EXPERIMENTAL Turnip for Adreno 710/720/722 by vauzi - fix2 rebuild (corrected build, supersedes v2.6). Mesa 26.2.0, Vulkan 1.4.352. Per-GPU magic register tuning + documented GMEM sizes (710=512KiB, 720/722=1MiB). Recommended mode: sysmem. Other GPUs unaffected.

components.name: FEXCore-2605-Nightly-e02953dc1
components.blurb: FEX-Emu FEXCore — x86/x86_64-to-ARM64 dynamic recompiler. WoW64 layer that lets Wine run 32-bit and 64-bit Windows binaries on ARM64. Nightly build e02953dc1 (2026-06-04).

components.name: SMXZ_Turnip_v26.2.0_R6
components.blurb: Turnip v26.2.0-R6 by stevenmx (Mesa 26.2.0, Vulkan 1.4.353). Targets Adreno A6xx/A7xx. Built from latest Mesa main.

components.name: SMXZ_Turnip_v26.2.0_R6_OneUI
components.blurb: Turnip v26.2.0-R6 OneUI variant by stevenmx (Mesa 26.2.0, Vulkan 1.4.353). Targets Adreno A6xx/A7xx on Samsung One UI devices. Built from latest Mesa main.

components.name: SMXZ_Turnip_Gen8_V32
components.blurb: EXPERIMENTAL Turnip Gen8 V32 by stevenmx (whitebelyash mesa-unified turnip/gen8, Vulkan 1.4.352). A8xx support for Adreno a810/a825/a829/a830/a840. Recommended mode: sysmem (TU_DEBUG=sysmem).

components.name: WHITE_Turnip_A8XX_V29
components.blurb: Turnip A8XX V29 by whitebelyash (Mesa, Vulkan 1.4.335). A8xx support for Adreno 810/825/829/830/840 (+ A7xx/A6xx, reduced perf). Recommended mode: sysmem (TU_DEBUG=sysmem); TU_DEBUG=deck_emu spoofs Steam Deck. Built from whitebelyash mesa-unified turnip/gen8.

components.name: WHITE_Turnip_A8XX_V29_sync
components.blurb: Turnip A8XX V29 (sync) by whitebelyash (Mesa, Vulkan 1.4.335). Synchronization-enabled build. A8xx support for Adreno 810/825/829/830/840 (+ A7xx/A6xx, reduced perf). Recommended mode: sysmem (TU_DEBUG=sysmem); TU_DEBUG=deck_emu spoofs Steam Deck. Built from whitebelyash mesa-unified turnip/gen8.
